# I Don't Have a Will

> Free, programmatic estate planning resource with state-by-state will requirements and DIY guidance.

I Don't Have a Will helps people who don't have estate planning in place understand what happens if they die intestate, what their state requires for a valid will, and how to take a first step. The site is programmatic SEO covering all 50 states plus general estate planning topics.

## Key pages
- [Estate Planning Overview](https://idonthaveawill.com/estate-planning)
- [Will Requirements by State](https://idonthaveawill.com/will-requirements)
- [Why You Need a Will](https://idonthaveawill.com/why-you-need-a-will)

## State coverage
50 state pages under `/will-requirements/[state]` covering legal requirements, witness rules, holographic will rules, and intestate succession.

## Important
This site is informational only. It is NOT legal advice. Users with complex estates should consult an attorney.

## Optional
- [Sitemap (XML)](https://idonthaveawill.com/sitemap.xml)
